title: Kahan Shuru Kahan Khatam
description: Meera is about to get married against her wishes and she decides to escape on the wedding day. On the run now, she bumps into a serial wedding crasher, who reluctantly decides to help her and the two develop an unlikely bond. Meanwhile, Meera’s family come to look for her and the chaos ensues when the circumstances make it seem like she has run away with him.
